build.buildCommand: sh -lc "if command -v pnpm >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'pnpm already present'; else npm install -g pnpm; fi; pnpm install && pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=api --filter=discord-bot"

deploy.startCommand: sh -lc "case \"$SERVICE_ROLE\" in worker) pnpm --filter api worker ;; bot) pnpm --filter discord-bot start ;; *) pnpm --filter api start ;; esac"
